lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: See that big mountain outside? That's the Darkfrost. There's a nice beastie up there called the Hueycoatl.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: You humans don't seem to care that much, so as usual it's up to us to stop it making a big mess of the entire area.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: I am. Dealing with the Hueycoatl is hard work, and it's not like you humans care enough to contribute much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, if you're in need of help, I'm open to contributing.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: You are? Oh... Fair enough then. In that case, head on up the mountain and get stuck in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've actually been up there helping myself.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.text: You have? Oh... Fair enough then. I guess you've earned yourself a break as well.
